creator: patrick@mindstep.com
text:
pipsecd is a small implementation of IPSec tunnels that uses
the /dev/tun interface and the OpenSSL library for encryption.

This port is based on the *current* version of pipsecd. It modifies
it in two ways:
- update the location of the openssl library
- put configuration stuff in $(PREFIX)/etc/ipsec instead of /etc/ipsec

It should be categorized in the security and net sections of the ports.

How-To-Repeat: 
n/a
